reviews.review_description: Okay I’m shook  best game ever
It’s a good game but the only problem is it has not been updated in a while and needs a reason to play because you start with all the maps and the guns

Fun game with lots of potential, easy to play and some fun powerups.  Would really love to see a smooth locomotion option, the snap turn can be disorienting and makes you lose orientation to the targets.  Would also like to have audio cues for the zoms and of course more locations to play.  Please keep working on this, I’d gladly pay for a fully developed game.

developer_response.body: Thank you for trying out the game Squirrely! I'm glad you enjoyed it and I appreciate the great suggestions!
